overall.description: Static cinematic shot from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a modern bedroom interior with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a hazy, dense futuristic cityscape. The scene features a platform bed with white linens, a spherical lamp on a bedside table, and a palm tree visible through the window against a backdrop of towering urban buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: standing still in the room, observing the interior and the cityscape visible through the window

entered.detail: low-profile bed with white linens and pillows, occupying the central foreground
large panoramic windows forming the far wall, revealing the exterior cityscape
dense futuristic urban skyline visible through the windows, obscured by atmospheric haze
single palm tree visible through the window against the city backdrop
round dark spherical object on the bedside table, possibly a lamp or decorative item
dark wooden nightstand positioned to the right of the bed
illuminated rectangular wall fixture on the left side of the frame
transparent glass divider separating the sleeping area from another room section

segments.scene_description: A static view of a modern, dimly lit bedroom interior from a video game. The camera remains fixed on a platform bed with white linens, while floor-to-ceiling windows reveal a hazy, futuristic cityscape outside with a prominent palm tree. The room features contemporary furniture including a spherical lamp on a bedside table and a glass partition, with no movement or action occurring throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic gaze over a modern bedroom that blends interior minimalism with a hazy, futuristic urban backdrop. It begins with a fixed view of a dimly lit room, centering on a platform bed dressed in white linens. As the eye wanders toward the perimeter, the space opens up through floor-to-ceiling windows that reveal a dense, atmospheric cityscape. The scene then settles on the contrast between the contemporary furniture, such as the spherical bedside lamp and glass partition, and the solitary palm tree standing against the towering buildings outside.
